description_long: This is a large, modern entertainment cabinet or shelving unit, primarily constructed from wood with a two-tone finish of light brown and white. The structure features a wide central open space likely intended for a television, flanked by vertical shelving on one side and a closed compartment with a door on the other. The lower section includes additional open shelves and a closed cabinet, providing ample storage for electronics, books, or decorative items. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for displaying objects or additional storage. The design is clean and geometric, with straight lines and a combination of open and closed storage spaces. The visible hardware is minimal, contributing to a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A large, two-tone wooden entertainment cabinet with open shelves, a closed compartment, and a wide central space for a TV. Its modern design features both storage and display areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open central space, side shelving, and closed compartment with visible hardware.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and layered construction of the cabinet, with the white and wood finishes visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view highlighting the back panel, side shelving, and the open lower shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wood side and the profile of the closed compartment.
